response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced engineer with genuine IDE tooling exposure (NI LabWindows/CVI) and strong testing/craftsmanship credentials, but the core stack does not match. Their career centers on TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, and web platforms, with only incidental Java and no evident Kotlin, Spring, or enterprise JVM framework experience — the central required qualifications for this role. The gap between their background and deep JVM/Spring expertise is too large for a mid-senior IC position focused on enterprise Java/Kotlin tooling.
strengths: Direct IDE internals experience building C/C++ components for NI LabWindows/CVI
Strong software craftsmanship background: TDD, testing libraries, developer tooling, workshops
Broad polyglot experience across large-scale, high-throughput systems
concerns: No demonstrated Kotlin or Spring ecosystem experience
Java appears only marginally in the work history; no deep JVM expertise shown
Recent focus is full-stack web and AI-agent tooling, not enterprise JVM developer tools
